RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd, os, textwrap, matplotlib.pyplot as plt
path="/mnt/data/assistant-XoFcRwENZLR9RMVypCZuHh-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df=pd.read_csv(path)
df.columns

import pandas as pd, matplotlib.pyplot as plt, seaborn as sns, os

path="/mnt/data/assistant-XoFcRwENZLR9RMVypCZuHh-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df=pd.read_csv(path)

transport=df[df['sector'].astype(str).str.upper()=="TRANSPORTATION"].copy()
transport['operating_profit']=pd.to_numeric(transport['operating_profit'], errors='coerce')
transport=transport.dropna(subset=['operating_profit']).sort_values('operating_profit', ascending=False)

plt.figure(figsize=(10,5.5))
sns.barplot(data=transport, x='name', y='operating_profit', color='#2E86AB')
plt.title('Operating Profit - TRANSPORTATION Sector')
plt.xlabel('Company')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit')
plt.xticks(rotation=35, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()

out_png="/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(out_png, dpi=200, bbox_inches='tight')
out_png

content.text:
I created the bar chart for **Operating Profit** in the **TRANSPORTATION** sector from your uploaded CSV.

[Download the bar chart (PNG)](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png)
